message:
fix(similar): log warning when semantic search fails and falls back

Adds diagnostic logging when semantic search fails silently to help
debug embedding/search issues. The fallback to keyword search still
happens, but now a warning is logged with the error details.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
